subject: Your channel analytics are ready
preview: See how your latest upload performed this week.
body_html: Your channel analytics are available in YouTube Studio.

subject: Urgent: your cloud billing account requires verification
preview: Failure to verify may result in temporary suspension of compute and storage resources.
body_html:
Dear Customer,

Oracle Cloud Infrastructure is updating its tax and billing compliance protocols for the current fiscal year. To maintain uninterrupted service for your cloud tenants, you must verify the primary responsible party for your billing account.

Impact: Failure to verify by April 1 may result in temporary suspension of compute and storage resources.

Verify Billing Account

subject: Shared folder: Invoice

body_html: A new folder was shared with you on Dropbox.

subject: Comment mentioned you in a prototype review
preview: Open the file to respond to feedback from the design team.
